checklist.detail: Requeue guidance explicitly says 'do NOT create a second copy under internal/engine/' and 'EXTEND the existing internal/language_tiers/ package.' Diff creates new files in internal/engine/ instead. KnownLanguages() in detect.go not generic.go. Plan's structural intent violated even though functional registry and three tests exist.
checklist.label: Implements the approved plan

checklist.detail: Edits are thematically scoped to the issue (tier registry + test) but placed in wrong files: detect.go instead of generic.go, and engine/ package instead of existing language_tiers/ package as requeue guidance demands.
checklist.label: Minimal and scoped

checklist.detail: All three tests are legitimate: exhaustive KnownLanguages() coverage check, unknown-language fail-safe, and Swift regression pin. No test deletion, no hard-coded expected values to force green.
checklist.label: No test-gaming / faking

checklist.detail: Creates a competing/duplicate tier system in internal/engine/ alongside existing internal/language_tiers/ from #29 — two tier classifiers in one codebase is a regression risk and violates explicit authoritative guidance. Also modifies languageToAdapter with 4 new entries, changing discovery behavior beyond mere exposure.
checklist.label: Safe to advance

checklist.detail: at or above the confidence bar

dimensions.evidence: Requeue guidance explicitly says 'do NOT create a second copy under internal/engine/' and 'EXTEND the existing internal/language_tiers/ package.' Diff creates new files in internal/engine/ instead. KnownLanguages() in detect.go not generic.go. Plan's structural intent violated even though functional registry and three tests exist.

Edits are thematically scoped to the issue (tier registry + test) but placed in wrong files: detect.go instead of generic.go, and engine/ package instead of existing language_tiers/ package as requeue guidance demands.
All three tests are legitimate: exhaustive KnownLanguages() coverage check, unknown-language fail-safe, and Swift regression pin. No test deletion, no hard-coded expected values to force green.

Creates a competing/duplicate tier system in internal/engine/ alongside existing internal/language_tiers/ from #29 — two tier classifiers in one codebase is a regression risk and violates explicit authoritative guidance. Also modifies languageToAdapter with 4 new entries, changing discovery behavior beyond mere exposure.

failureReasons: Requeue guidance (authoritative) forbids creating files under internal/engine/ — must extend existing internal/language_tiers/ package. Diff creates internal/engine/language_tiers.go and _test.go in direct violation, creating a duplicate tier system alongside the existing one from #29.
KnownLanguages() placed in detect.go instead of the specified generic.go per approved plan.
languageToAdapter map modified with 4 new entries (ruby, java, kotlin, shell) — a behavior change to discovery beyond the plan's intent of merely exposing existing data.
